ocr.text: Biochemical and Behavior Changes with Loud Sound
Figure 10. Effects of loud music and noise exposure on spatial memory. Histograms showing the time (Mean 6 SD) taken to exit the
isolation box (A), total time (Mean 6 SD) to reach the target (B) and the exploration time (Mean 6 SD) in the T-arm (C) during the third and fourth
trial (24 h after the third trial). No significant alteration is observed between the trials in control and music stimulated group (A–C). Note that the time
taken by the noise stimulated chicks is significantly increased in the fourth trial compared to the third for all the three parameters (A–C). *** p#0.001;
** p#0.004; * p#0.03. IBL = Isolation box latency; TT = Total time; ET = Exploration time; 3, 4 denote third and fourth trial.
